# Golden file: core.git pack
format: v1
---
# D1: git push --force
command: git push --force origin main
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: core.git
rule: git-push-force
---
# D2: git push --mirror
command: git push --mirror
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: core.git
rule: git-push-mirror
---
# D3: git reset --hard
command: git reset --hard HEAD~1
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: core.git
rule: git-reset-hard
---
# D4: git checkout -- .
command: git checkout -- .
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: core.git
rule: git-checkout-discard-all
---
# D5: git rebase
decision: Deny
command: git rebase main
severity: High
confidence: Medium
pack: core.git
rule: git-rebase
---
# D6: git clean -f
command: git clean -f
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: High
pack: core.git
rule: git-clean-force
---
# D7: git clean -fd
command: git clean -fd
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: High
pack: core.git
rule: git-clean-force-dirs
---
# D8: git branch -D
command: git branch -D old
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: High
pack: core.git
rule: git-branch-force-delete
---
# D9: git push --delete
command: git push origin --delete old
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: High
pack: core.git
rule: git-push-delete
---
# D10: git stash drop
command: git stash drop stash@{0}
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: High
pack: core.git
rule: git-stash-drop
---
# D11: git checkout -- file (Low)
command: git checkout -- app/main.go
decision: Allow
severity: Low
confidence: Medium
pack: core.git
rule: git-checkout-discard-file
---
# D12: git checkout .
command: git checkout .
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: core.git
rule: git-checkout-dot
---
# D13: git push :branch
command: git push origin :old
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: High
pack: core.git
rule: git-push-refspec-delete
---
# D14: git push +refspec
command: git push origin +main:main
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: Medium
pack: core.git
rule: git-push-force-refspec
---
# D15: git restore .
command: git restore .
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: core.git
rule: git-restore-worktree-all
---
# D16: git restore --source
command: git restore --source HEAD~2 app/main.go
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: Medium
pack: core.git
rule: git-restore-source
---
# D17: git reflog expire
command: git reflog expire --expire=now --all
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: core.git
rule: git-reflog-expire
---
# D18: git gc --prune
decision: Ask
command: git gc --prune=now
severity: Medium
confidence: Medium
pack: core.git
rule: git-gc-prune
---
# D19: git filter-branch
command: git filter-branch --tree-filter 'rm secret.txt' HEAD
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: Medium
pack: core.git
rule: git-filter-branch
---
# D20: git restore file (Low)
command: git restore app/main.go
decision: Allow
severity: Low
confidence: Medium
pack: core.git
rule: git-restore-file
---
# S1: git push safe
command: git push origin main
decision: Allow
---
# S2: git push --force-with-lease
command: git push --force-with-lease origin main
decision: Allow
---
# S3: git branch -d
command: git branch -d merged
decision: Allow
---
# S4: git reset --soft
command: git reset --soft HEAD~1
decision: Allow
---
# S5: git rebase --abort
command: git rebase --abort
decision: Allow
---
# S6: git status
command: git status
decision: Allow
---
# S7: git log
command: git log --oneline
decision: Allow
---
# S8: git diff
command: git diff HEAD~1
decision: Allow
---
# S9: git restore --staged
command: git restore --staged app/main.go
decision: Allow
---
# S10: git fetch
command: git fetch origin
decision: Allow
---
# S11: git switch
command: git switch main
decision: Allow
